title: agrostis alba subsp. verticillata
intro: Agrostis alba subsp. verticillata, also known as White Bent or Bristle Bent, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis alba subsp. verticillata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
